message.content:
Build the chat message components for the OmegA web app at /home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/.

This is a Next.js App Router app using CSS Modules (NOT Tailwind). Design tokens:
--void: #02020c; --indigo: #6366f1; --violet: #8b5cf6; --lavender: #c4b5fd; --gold: #e4b84a; --white: #f1f5f9; --dim: rgba(241,245,249,0.45); --dimmer: rgba(241,245,249,0.18); --glass-bg: rgba(8,8,28,0.72); --glass-border: rgba(139,92,246,0.18);
Fonts: 'Orbitron' for headers, 'Space Grotesk' for body.

Read the existing page.tsx first to understand current message rendering:
/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/app/page.tsx
/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/app/page.module.css

Then create:

1. `/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/MessageBubble/UserMessage.tsx` + `.module.css`
   - Clean right-aligned bubble for user messages
   - Subtle glass background (darker than omega messages)
   - Timestamp in dim text
   - Fade-up entrance animation

2. `/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/MessageBubble/OmegaMessage.tsx` + `.module.css`
   - Left-aligned bubble for omega responses  
   - Small Ω icon/avatar to the left
   - Full markdown rendering with react-markdown (already installed)
   - Code blocks with copy button and syntax highlighting (use inline styles for a dark code theme)
   - Provider badge: small text showing "-fallback" or "omega-gateway" etc
   - Timestamp
   - Fade-up entrance animation

3. `/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/MessageBubble/ThinkingIndicator.tsx` + `.module.css`
   - Cycling status text ("reading memory...", "synthesizing...", "reasoning...")
   - Three bouncing dots animation
   - Gold glow during thinking state
   - Smooth fade in/out

4. `/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/InputArea/InputArea.tsx` + `.module.css`
   - Multiline textarea that grows with content (min 1 row, max 6 rows)
   - Send button with Ω glyph that glows on hover
   - Character count (subtle, bottom right)
   - Glass background with indigo border
   - Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
   - Disabled state while streaming
   - Auto-focus on mount and after response completes
   - Placeholder text: "Ask OmegA anything..."

Props for InputArea:
- onSend: (text: string) => void
- disabled: boolean
- autoFocus: boolean

5. `/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/ChatHeader/ChatHeader.tsx` + `.module.css`
   - Top bar for the chat area
   - "OmegA" title (Orbitron font)
   - Provider indicator (small badge)
   - Mobile: hamburger button to toggle sidebar
   - Glass background, subtle bottom border

All components use 'use client'. Make them visually stunning — futuristic, cosmic, dark. Every hover should have a subtle glow transition. Messages should animate in smoothly.

content.text: Now let me create the directories and all the component files.
Now I'll create all 10 files in parallel.

All 10 files created. Here is what was built:

**MessageBubble/UserMessage** (`/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/MessageBubble/UserMessage.tsx` + `.module.css`)
- Right-aligned glass bubble with darker background than omega messages
- Indigo border that brightens on hover with subtle glow
- Timestamp in dim text below
- Fade-up entrance animation

**MessageBubble/OmegaMessage** (`/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/MessageBubble/OmegaMessage.tsx` + `.module.css`)
- Left-aligned with a gradient-bordered circular avatar showing the glyph
- Full react-markdown + remark-gfm rendering
- Code blocks with dark inline theme (lavender text on near-void background), language badge, and copy button with hover glow
- Provider badge (small uppercase pill), timestamp, and copy-all button in footer
- Streaming state: enhanced border glow + blinking cursor
- Fade-up entrance animation

**MessageBubble/ThinkingIndicator** (`/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/MessageBubble/ThinkingIndicator.tsx` + `.module.css`)
- Gold-glowing avatar with pulsing box-shadow animation
- Three bouncing dots in gold
- Cycling status labels ("reading memory...", "synthesizing...", "reasoning...") with crossfade transitions
- Supports direct `status` prop override text
- Smooth fade-in

**InputArea/InputArea** (`/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/InputArea/InputArea.tsx` + `.module.css`)
- Auto-growing textarea (1 to 6 rows)
- Circular send button with glyph that glows/scales on hover when input is present
- Subtle character count in bottom-right
- Glass background with indigo border that intensifies on focus
- Enter sends, Shift+Enter for newline
- Disabled state with reduced opacity
- Auto-focus on mount and when re-enabled
- Props: `onSend`, `disabled`, `autoFocus`

**ChatHeader/ChatHeader** (`/home/mega/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/components/ChatHeader/ChatHeader.tsx` + `.module.css`)
- Sticky glass header with blur backdrop
- "OmegA" in Orbitron with gradient glyph
- Provider badge (small pill)
- Green status dot + "Sovereign" label
- Hamburger button hidden on desktop, visible at 768px breakpoint
- "+ New" button with hover glow
- Gradient bottom border line
- Gold pulse on glyph during thinking state
